name: Media Player Widget
author: tanujairamv
description: A simple media player desktop widget.

settings.label: Show Desktop Gadget
settings.description: Show the media player widget on the desktop background.

settings.label: Show in System Bar
settings.description: Show media controls in the top system bar.

settings.label: Enable Peek Function
settings.description: Show the gadget briefly when media status changes.

settings.label: Peek Duration (ms)
settings.description: How long the gadget stays visible during a peek.
